body:
Closes #2526.

`Handler::respond` panicked whenever a client connected without setting `latency_ms`, because the config value was read with `.unwrap()` instead of falling back to a default. Ironic for a service whose entire job is to never fail at doing nothing.

Fix switches to `.unwrap_or(0)` so an unset delay just means an instant response. Added a regression test that sends a request with a default config and asserts we still get a clean `200 OK` instead of a panic.
